# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for edge computing security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

interface PluginModule {
  handler?: (req: Request) => Response | Promise<Response>;
  init?: () => void | Promise<void>;
}

const ALLOWED_MODULE_HOSTS = [
  "deno.land",
  "esm.sh",
  "cdn.skypack.dev",
  "cdn.jsdelivr.net",
];

const ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS = [
  /^https:\/\/deno\.land\/x\/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+@[0-9.]+\/.+\.ts$/,
  /^https:\/\/esm\.sh\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.skypack\.dev\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.jsdelivr\.net\/npm\/[a-zA-Z0-9@/_-]+$/,
];

const loadedPlugins = new Map<string, PluginModule>();

function validateModulePath(modulePath: string): boolean {
  try {
    const url = new URL(modulePath);
    
    if (url.protocol !== "https:") {
      return false;
    }
    
    if (!ALLOWED_MODULE_HOSTS.includes(url.hostname)) {
      return false;
    }
    
    return ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS.some(pattern => pattern.test(modulePath));
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function getConfiguredModules(): string[] {
  const envModules = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES");
  if (!envModules) {
    return [];
  }
  
  return envModules
    .split(",")
    .map(m => m.trim())
    .filter(m => m.length > 0)
    .filter(validateModulePath);
}

async function loadPlugin(modulePath: string): Promise<PluginModule | null> {
  if (loadedPlugins.has(modulePath)) {
    return loadedPlugins.get(modulePath)!;
  }
  
  if (!validateModulePath(modulePath)) {
    console.error(`Invalid module path: ${modulePath}`);
    return null;
  }
  
  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    const plugin: PluginModule = {
      handler: module.handler,
      init: module.init,
    };
    
    if (plugin.init) {
      await plugin.init();
    }
    
    loadedPlugins.set(modulePath, plugin);
    return plugin;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load plugin ${modulePath}:`, error);
    return null;
  }
}

async function initializePlugins() {
  const configuredModules = getConfiguredModules();
  
  for (const modulePath of configuredModules) {
    await loadPlugin(modulePath);
  }
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  
  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: "ok" }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  if (url.pathname === "/plugins") {
    const plugins = Array.from(loadedPlugins.keys());
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ plugins }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  if (url.pathname === "/load-plugin") {
    const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module");
    
    if (!modulePath) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Missing module parameter" }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
    
    if (!validateModulePath(modulePath)) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ 
        error: "Invalid module path. Only whitelisted CDN hosts are allowed.",
        allowedHosts: ALLOWED_MODULE_HOSTS
      }), {
        status: 403,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
    
    const plugin = await loadPlugin(modulePath);
    
    if (!plugin) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Failed to load plugin" }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    }
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ 
      success: true,
      module: modulePath 
    }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  for (const [modulePath, plugin] of loadedPlugins.entries()) {
    if (plugin.handler) {
      try {
        const response = await plugin.handler(req);
        if (response.status !== 404) {
          return response;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Plugin ${modulePath} error:`, error);
      }
    }
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ 
    message: "Welcome to the plugin system",
    endpoints: {
      health: "/health",
      plugins: "/plugins",
      loadPlugin: "/load-plugin?module=<url>"
    }
  }), {
    headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
  });
}

await initializePlugins();

serve(handler);
